description:
Transform this WordPress blog into a professional corporate website for a tech consulting firm called 'NexGen Solutions'.

Create the following page hierarchy:
- 'Services' (top-level parent page)
  - 'Web Development' (child of Services)
  - 'Mobile Apps' (child of Services)
  - 'Cloud Solutions' (child of Services)
- 'About' (standalone top-level page)
- 'Careers' (standalone top-level page)

Each page must contain at least 50 words of relevant, professional content related to its title.

Configure the site to display the 'Services' page as the static front page. Set the site title to 'NexGen Solutions' and the tagline to 'Innovative Technology Consulting'.
